design_philosophy: Modern travel aesthetic — warm, photography-forward, sense of adventure and trust. Prioritizes immersive imagery, trust-building via verified badges, and simple discovery flows.

buttons.primary: bg-[#E07A5F] text-white rounded-full py-4 px-8 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-[#E5E3DB] text-[#1A1A1A] rounded-full py-4 px-8 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center

cards.bento_item: bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-[#E5E3DB]

badges.verified: flex items-center gap-1 bg-[#EAF0F6] text-[#3D5A80] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold

inputs.text: bg-[#F3F1ED] rounded-xl px-4 py-4 text-[#1A1A1A] font-medium placeholder-[#8A8A8A] focus:border-[#E07A5F] border border-transparent

hero_welcome.description: Traveler looking at calm body of water

welcome.layout: Full bleed background image (hero_welcome) with dark gradient overlay at bottom. Content anchored to bottom.

kyc_flow.layout: Step-by-step progress flow. High whitespace, trust-building copy.

explore_home.layout: Mobile-first scrolling layout. 'Bento' style grid for recommendations.
components: Header with User Avatar and Search Icon

place_detail.layout: Sticky header with image gallery. Content scrolls up over the image with a rounded-t-3xl border.

write_review.layout: Clean, focused form. Keyboard-aware scroll view.

profile.layout: Header with avatar and stats. Tabs for 'Reviews', 'Photos', 'Saved'.
components: Masonry or Grid list of previous reviews

testing.attributes: All interactive elements must include a 'testID' attribute in React Native (equivalent to data-testid) using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., testID='login-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React Native (Expo) with NativeWind for styling. Map the Tailwind classes provided in these guidelines to NativeWind's className attribute.
Implement navigation using Expo Router with a bottom tab navigator for the main screens: Explore, Search, Write Review (FAB style), Profile.
Always use the provided Unsplash/Pexels image URLs for placeholders. NEVER use via.placeholder.com or similar dummy services.
For the bottom tab bar, keep it clean with no background color (white) and a subtle top border. Use Terracotta (#E07A5F) for the active tab icon.
Ensure 'Outfit' font is used for headers and 'Manrope' for body copy. If custom fonts cannot be loaded quickly, fallback to system sans-serif but maintain font weights.
Keep shadows subtle. NativeWind shadows sometimes behave differently than web; prioritize 'elevation' on Android and subtle shadow opacity on iOS.
Test all clickable areas to be at least 44x44px for thumb-friendly mobile UI.
When applying gradient overlays to images, use expo-linear-gradient.
